about.title: About Me
about.bio_intro: Hello, I am <1>Matheus Reis Mendonca</1>, a Senior Fullstack Developer focused on creating robust, scalable, and efficient systems, acting from data modeling to the user interface.
about.bio_trajectory_p1: With a strong background of almost a decade working with databases and more than 4 years dedicated to software development, I acquired a deep and systemic view of how successful applications are architected behind the scenes.
about.bio_trajectory_p2: My main expertise lies in the backend using <1>C# and the .NET platform</1>, which I employ in the development of scalable REST APIs for corporate systems, ensuring the performance of the most complex business logic.
about.bio_work_p1: I believe that the true value of technology is in solving business problems elegantly. My Fullstack profile allows me to navigate smoothly through the entire development pipeline of the application lifecycle — helping companies reduce communication noise between frontend and backend barriers.
about.resume_desc: My detailed trajectory and professional qualifications.

problem_solving.title: Problem Solving
problem_solving.desc: Mindset focused on solving real problems using technology. Analytical capacity to investigate complex bugs, understand data flows, and structure efficient solutions.

tech_comm.title: Technical Communication
tech_comm.desc: Ease in translating complex technical problems into clear solutions for teams and stakeholders, facilitating decision-making.

systemic_thinking.title: Systemic Thinking
systemic_thinking.desc: Wide view of systems architecture, ensuring scalability and long-term maintenance. Full understanding of application flow, from database to interface.

analytical_capacity.title: Analytical Capacity
analytical_capacity.desc: Naturally developed through years working with backend, APIs, and databases. Ability to investigate complex problems and structure efficient solutions.

tech_adaptability.title: Technical Adaptability
tech_adaptability.desc: Experience with diverse technologies — .NET, Angular, FlutterFlow, SQL, Web Frontend — demonstrating great capacity to adapt to project needs.

team_collab.title: Team Collaboration
team_collab.desc: Experience working in agile teams and collaborating with developers, designers, and product managers in corporate environments.

performance_focus.title: Focus on Performance
performance_focus.desc: Constant concern with system optimization, API performance, database efficiency, and query optimization.

proactivity.title: Proactivity and Initiative
proactivity.desc: 'Hands-on' attitude in identifying improvement opportunities, proposing new architectures or automations even before problems become critical.

time_management.title: Time Management
time_management.desc: Consolidated ability to prioritize demands and organize complex technical deliveries maintaining a continuous and pragmatic flow for the business.

exp.title: Technical Experience
exp.subtitle: My areas of expertise, showing solid mastery in the end-to-end creation of complex corporate solutions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Shall we talk? I am available for new challenges, partnerships, and opportunities to develop incredible solutions together.

hero.description_1: Fullstack Developer specializing in backend with <1>.NET</1> and <1>C#</1>, with solid experience in developing scalable <1>REST APIs</1>, system integrations, and enterprise applications.
hero.description_2: I act in building complete solutions, from database modeling and optimization to modern UI development with <1>Angular</1>, <1>JavaScript</1>, and mobile apps with <1>React Native</1>, always focusing on performance, scalability, and code quality.
